title: Labour Market Enforcement: annual report 2023 to 2025
body: "This is the 2023 to 2025 annual report from Margaret Beels, Director of Labour Market Enforcement (DLME).  It assesses labour market enforcement in the following Labour Market Enforcement strategies:    Labour Market Enforcement Strategy 2023 to 2024   Labour Market Enforcement Strategy 2024 to 2025    The annual report sets out:   an assessment of progress made against implementation of the recommendations from the 2023 to 2024 and 2024 to 2025 Labour Market Enforcement strategies an assessment as far as possible of the effect on the scale and nature of non‑compliance in the labour market a statement of activities relating to the director’s information hub undertaken in the reporting period  "
